subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and from its contents it became evident that, praise be unto God, the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و از مضمون واضح گردید که الحمد لله یاران
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
